race.description: Nar Nar Goon Hotel Maiden Plate
race.comment: DUN GRACEFULLY (7) has been knocking on the door with back-to-back seconds, the latest a near miss at Cranbourne. The last two runs have been at Cranbourne in far richer maidens so comes back a notch. Has a low draw and will take catching again. UNAPPROACHABLE (11) showed ability in her first campaign then returned in a richer race at Pakenham with a fast finishing and close-up sixth. Fitter and looks well placed here. Go close. YOU SAID WHAT (12) placed here last time and looks like one of the main chances. ANGLESEA (2) has upside and is expected to run well off the back of two good jump-outs.
